violations.text: The walk-in freezer was not in good repair. Unit was observed icing up. Unit shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the next to the kitchen in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Door sweep to be replaced. Per PIC, work order will be placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The walk-in Freezer was observed with a large accumulation of ice on the floor. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

At the time of inspection, the following equipment was observed to be in poor repair... - The Rinse Cycle Temperature Gauge to the High Temp. Dish Machine was observed to be cracked and not displaying the Rinse Cycle Temperature. - The Walk-In Freezer was observed to have excessive ice build-up below the ceiling mounted fan unit on plumbing and on the floor. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair/properly adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2023

The dishwasher located in the ware-washing area was not in good repair. Per person in charge, establishment has not been using the dishwasher and have already placed a work order for it to be repaired. Establishment is currently using the 3-bay sink to wash equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
